LanguageData.FCP_Gun_AER14_Prototype.description: An experimental variant of the AER laser rifle series, the AER14 prototype features improved focusing crystals and an advanced energy regulator. It delivers greater accuracy and damage than standard laser rifles, though its prototype status makes it rare and expensive to produce.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_AER14_Prototype.label: AER14 Prototype
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_AER14_Prototype.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_AER14_Prototype.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Flamer_MkI.description: The Flamer Mk I is an early-generation incendiary weapon that sprays a stream of burning fuel at close to medium range. Favored by pre-war military forces for clearing trenches and fortifications, it excels at dealing with groups of enemies in confined spaces. Its crude but effective design makes it a terror on the battlefield.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Flamer_MkI.label: Flamer Mk I
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Flamer_MkI.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Flamer_MkI.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Flamer_MkI.verbs.0.label: spray burning fuel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Flamer_MkII.description: An improved version of the original flamer design, the Mk II features enhanced fuel efficiency, greater range, and more consistent flame projection. Popular among pre-war assault teams and post-war scavengers alike, it represents the pinnacle of portable incendiary weapon technology before the war.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Flamer_MkII.label: Flamer Mk II
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Flamer_MkII.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Flamer_MkII.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Flamer_MkII.verbs.0.label: spray burning fuel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Gatling_Laser.description: A huge and heavy laser weapon reminiscent of Minigun and popular with the Brotherhood of Steel. Its individual shots do little damage, but this is entirely compensated by its extremely high rate of fire. It excels at the same areas as the Minigun, providing suppressing fire over short and medium distances.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Gatling_Laser.label: Gatling Laser
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Gatling_Laser.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Gatling_Laser.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Gatling_Laser_MkI.description: An early model of the Gatling Laser, this heavy weapon features a rotary barrel design that allows for sustained automatic fire. While less refined than later models, it remains a formidable suppressive weapon capable of laying down withering laser fire.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Gatling_Laser_MkI.label: Gatling Laser Mk I
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Gatling_Laser_MkI.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Gatling_Laser_MkI.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Gauss_Minigun.description: A devastating heavy weapon combining electromagnetic acceleration technology with minigun-style rotating barrels. The Gauss minigun fires a continuous stream of electromagnetically propelled projectiles capable of shredding armor and flesh alike. Its immense firepower comes at the cost of considerable weight and power requirements.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Gauss_Minigun.label: Gauss Minigun
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Gauss_Minigun.tools.0.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Gauss_Sniper_Rifle.description: A masterwork gauss weapon designed for extreme long-range precision. This unique rifle features an extended barrel, advanced targeting optics, and refined electromagnetic coils that deliver unparalleled accuracy at distances that would make conventional snipers envious. Each shot represents the perfect marriage of pre-War science and deadly efficiency.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Gauss_Sniper_Rifle.label: Gauss Sniper Rifle
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Gauss_Sniper_Rifle.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Gauss_Sniper_Rifle.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Glock_86_Plasma_Pistol.descripti: A pre-War German-designed plasma pistol that represents the pinnacle of compact energy weapon engineering. The Glock 86 features revolutionary magnetic field stabilization that dramatically improves accuracy and reduces cooldown time compared to standard plasma pistols. This exceptionally rare weapon was never mass-produced.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Glock_86_Plasma_Pistol.label: Glock 86 Plasma Pistol
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Heavy_Incinerator.description: The Heavy Incinerator is a unique and devastating pre-war heavy flamethrower issued to elite Enclave Hellfire units. Built with reinforced components and an advanced fuel delivery system, it projects an intense stream of fire over considerable distances. This weapon is both a symbol of terror and a masterpiece of destructive engineering, capable of reducing enemies to ash.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Heavy_Incinerator.label: Heavy Incinerator
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Heavy_Incinerator.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Heavy_Incinerator.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Heavy_Incinerator.verbs.0.label: spray burning fuel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Laser_Carbine.description: A compact, shortened version of the standard laser rifle designed for close-quarters combat and urban operations. The laser carbine sacrifices some range and power for improved maneuverability and faster target acquisition, making it popular among scouts and special forces.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Laser_Carbine.label: Laser Carbine
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Laser_Carbine.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Laser_Carbine.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Laser_Pistol.description: The AEP7 laser pistol comes with a generous battery size, tight shot grouping at range, resilience to extended use, and fairly decent damage output, it is a very good choice for a sidearm and is used extensively in this role by the Brotherhood of Steel and the Enclave. Like other energy weapons, the laser pistol has the ability to reduce enemies to piles of steaming ash.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Laser_Pistol.label: Laser Pistol
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Laser_Pistol.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Laser_Pistol.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Laser_RCW.description: The laser rapid capacitor weapon is a strange gun that mimics a submachinegun. The unique feature of the RCW is the addition of a drum magazine, which gives this weapon its unique look, high rate of fire, and name. This weapon exhibits moderate accuracy due to a high spread for a laser weapon, making it useful for taking down enemies at almost any range.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Laser_RCW.label: Laser RCW
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Laser_RCW.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Laser_RCW.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Laser_Rifle.description: A staple of the pre-war armed forces, the laser rifle has become a somewhat unusual sight in the wasteland, especially one in good condition. They emit a concentrated beam of coherent light capable of severely damaging what- or whoever it was aimed at.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Laser_Rifle.label: Laser Rifle
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Laser_Rifle.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Laser_Rifle.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_M72_A2_Gauss_Rifle.description: An experimental prototype of the M72 Gauss rifle featuring advanced magnetic coil configuration and enhanced power cell efficiency. The M72 A2 represents the pinnacle of pre-War electromagnetic weapon technology, with improved accuracy and greater armor penetration than its standard counterpart. Only a handful were ever produced before the Great War.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_M72_A2_Gauss_Rifle.label: M72 A2 Gauss Rifle
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_M72_A2_Gauss_Rifle.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_M72_A2_Gauss_Rifle.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_M72_Gauss_Rifle.description: The M72 Gauss rifle is a top-of-the-line pre-War weapon utilizing electromagnetic coils to accelerate metallic projectiles to hypersonic velocities. Capable of punching through most armor with ease, the Gauss rifle is a testament to pre-War military innovation. Its precision and stopping power are legendary among wasteland survivors.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_M72_Gauss_Rifle.label: M72 Gauss Rifle
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_M72_Gauss_Rifle.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_M72_Gauss_Rifle.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_MF_Hyperbreeder_Alpha.descriptio: An advanced experimental weapon featuring a revolutionary hyperbreeder energy cell that regenerates ammunition at an unprecedented rate. This unique pistol can sustain continuous fire far longer than conventional energy weapons, though each shot is relatively weak. Its futuristic design and exceptional reliability make it a prized possession.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_MF_Hyperbreeder_Alpha.label: MF Hyperbreeder Alpha
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Multiplas_Rifle.description: The Multiplas Rifle is a heavily modified plasma weapon that fires three plasma projectiles in a spread with each shot. While devastating at close range, its accuracy drops off quickly at distance, making it best suited for short- to mid-range combat.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Multiplas_Rifle.label: Multiplas Rifle
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Multiplas_Rifle.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Multiplas_Rifle.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_P_94_Plasma_Rifle.description: An experimental plasma rifle prototype featuring an enhanced magnetic field generator and advanced plasma containment system. The P-94 fires more powerful plasma bolts with greater stability than standard plasma rifles. This unique weapon never progressed beyond field testing due to its complex maintenance requirements.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_P_94_Plasma_Rifle.label: P-94 Plasma Rifle
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_P_94_Plasma_Rifle.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_P_94_Plasma_Rifle.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pew_Pew.description: An unusually styled energy pistol with distinctive blue coloring. Despite its toy-like name and appearance, the Pew Pew delivers surprisingly powerful shots using an advanced energy focusing system. Its unique design makes it a conversation piece as much as a weapon.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pew_Pew.label: Pew Pew
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pew_Pew.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Pew_Pew.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Plasma_Caster.description: The plasma caster functions very similar to its rifle-based counterpart. It was first developed as an industrial tool but was soon after downscaled and adapted as a weapon, itï¿½s still very heavy though. Compared to the plasma rifle, it fires both faster and harder-hitting, but is significantly less accurate.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Plasma_Caster.label: Plasma Caster
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Plasma_Caster.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Plasma_Caster.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Plasma_Caster_MkI.description: An earlier prototype of the Plasma Caster series. While lacking the refinement of later models, the Mk I is still a formidable heavy plasma weapon capable of delivering sustained plasma bombardment. Its crude magnetic confinement system makes it slightly less accurate but no less devastating.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Plasma_Caster_MkI.label: Plasma Caster Mk I
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Plasma_Caster_MkI.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Plasma_Caster_MkI.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Plasma_Defender.description: A compact, refined plasma pistol designed for reliability and ease of maintenance. The Plasma Defender features improved magnetic bottle containment and more efficient energy conversion than standard plasma pistols, making it a favored sidearm among wastelanders who can maintain it.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Plasma_Defender.label: Plasma Defender
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Plasma_Defender.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Plasma_Defender.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Plasma_Machine_Gun.description: The Plasma Machine Gun (PMG) is an experimental automatic plasma weapon that combines the rapid-fire capability of conventional machine guns with the devastating power of plasma technology. Using a revolutionary multi-cathode cyclic firing system, it can sustain fully automatic plasma fire at the cost of significant weight and power consumption. This unique heavy weapon was abandoned before mass production due to its extreme complexity.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Plasma_Machine_Gun.label: Plasma Machine Gun
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Plasma_Machine_Gun.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Plasma_Machine_Gun.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Plasma_Pistol.description: A downscaled version of the plasma rifle. The plasma pistol has five tributary energy arcs connected to a central cathode, and the cathode functions as a point of focus, or the barrel. The energy is projected forward and forms a plasma pinch; though rather slow, the pinch carries high levels of both thermal and kinetic energy, inflicting massive damage.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Plasma_Pistol.label: Plasma Pistol
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Plasma_Pistol.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Plasma_Pistol.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Plasma_Rifle.description: The plasma rifle is a powerful energy weapon that fires superheated bolts of plasma. Favored by advanced factions, it delivers devastating damage and is effective against both armored and unarmored targets, though its projectiles travel slower than lasers.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Plasma_Rifle.label: Plasma Rifle
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Plasma_Rifle.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Plasma_Rifle.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_PPK12_Gauss_Pistol.description: The PPK12 Gauss pistol is a German-designed electromagnetic weapon that uses magnetic induction to propel projectiles at extremely high velocities. Compact and reliable, it delivers devastating kinetic energy with minimal recoil, making it an excellent sidearm for those who can afford such advanced technology.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_PPK12_Gauss_Pistol.label: PPK12 Gauss Pistol
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_PPK12_Gauss_Pistol.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_PPK12_Gauss_Pistol.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Q35_Matter_Modulator.description: An incredibly rare prototype plasma weapon developed by REPCONN Aerospace before the Great War. The Q-35 uses experimental matter-energy conversion technology to create exceptionally powerful plasma projectiles with reduced energy consumption. Its distinctive crystalline energy chamber and superior performance make it one of the most sought-after energy weapons in the wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Q35_Matter_Modulator.label: Q-35 Matter Modulator
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Recharger_Pistol.description: The recharger pistol is a compact version of the recharger rifle, featuring a microfusion breeder that replenishes its ammunition automatically, no reloading required. While it can fire rapidly, the projectiles do less damage compared to a laser pistol. The breeder generates ammunition at a slow rate, meaning it can shoot bursts of projectiles fast, but there is considerable time in between those bursts. It is generally cheaper and more portable than the recharger rifle.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Recharger_Pistol.label: Recharger Pistol
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Recharger_Pistol.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Recharger_Pistol.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Recharger_Rifle.description: The recharger rifle was the first energy weapon featuring a microfusion breeder. It replenishes its ammunition automatically, no reloading required. However, the underlying technology wasnï¿½t very sophisticated yet. It can fire rapidly, but the projectiles do significantly less damage compared to a laser rifle. The inefficient breeder generates ammunition at a slow rate, meaning it can shoot bursts of projectiles fast, but there is a considerably time in between those bursts. At least it usually is a lot cheaper than a laser rifle.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Recharger_Rifle.label: Recharger Rifle
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Recharger_Rifle.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Recharger_Rifle.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Sprtel_Wood_9700_Unique.descript: A civilian laser pistol manufactured by Sprtel-Wood, the 9700 model was marketed as a home defense weapon before the war. While not as powerful as military-grade energy weapons, its reliability and ease of use made it popular among settlers and traders.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Sprtel_Wood_9700_Unique.label: Sprtel-Wood 9700
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Tri_Beam_Laser_Rifle.description: The tri-beam laser rifle appears to be a shortened laser rifle with a different emitter at its tip. It fires three beams of laser at once, serving as a high-tech alternative to shotguns. Like less advanced shotguns, the tri-beam laser rifle is best suited for combat over short ranges.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Tri_Beam_Laser_Rifle.label: Tri-Beam Laser Rifle
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Wattz_1000_Laser_Pistol.descript: An older model laser pistol manufactured by Wattz Electronics before the Great War. The Wattz 1000 uses a simpler focusing lens system than modern designs, resulting in somewhat reduced performance, but its robust construction ensures reliable operation even decades after manufacture.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Wattz_1000_Laser_Pistol.label: Wattz 1000 Laser Pistol
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Wattz_2000_Laser_Rifle.descripti: The rifle variant of Wattz Electronics' laser weapon line, the 2000 model features an extended barrel and improved power cell. While using older technology than modern AER series rifles, the Wattz 2000 remains a capable weapon favored for its durability and ease of maintenance.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Wattz_2000_Laser_Rifle.label: Wattz 2000 Laser Rifle
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_YK32_Pulse_Pistol.description: The YK32 is a compact electromagnetic pulse weapon designed for close-quarters anti-mechanoid combat. It fires concentrated electromagnetic pulses that disrupt electronic systems and neural implants while dealing moderate kinetic damage. Particularly effective against mechanoids and shielded targets, though less lethal against unarmored organic targets than conventional weapons.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_YK32_Pulse_Pistol.label: YK32 Pulse Pistol
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_YK32_Pulse_Pistol.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_YK32_Pulse_Pistol.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_YK42B_Pulse_Rifle.description: The YK42B represents the pinnacle of pre-War electromagnetic pulse weaponry. This military-grade pulse rifle fires high-intensity electromagnetic bursts capable of catastrophically disrupting mechanoid systems and neural networks at medium range. Its advanced capacitor array allows for sustained anti-mechanoid operations, making it invaluable in conflicts against automated forces. The weapon is particularly devastating against shielded and electronic targets, though its reduced lethality against unarmored organics limits its versatility.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_YK42B_Pulse_Rifle.label: YK42B Pulse Rifle
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_YK42B_Pulse_Rifle.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_YK42B_Pulse_Rifle.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FG_Filth_AshPile.label: Ash Pile
LanguageData.FG_Filth_Goop.label: goop
